title: Marie Curie Charity Christmas Cards Nutcracker Watercolour Design 14 x 14 cm Pack of 10 with Envelopes Traditional
features: DESIGN: Beautiful watercolour illustration featuring four festive nutcracker soldiers in blue uniforms with decorative floral border, perfect for spreading holiday cheer
VERSATILE USE: Blank interior allows for personalised messages, making these cards ideal for both personal and professional holiday greetings
COMPLETE SET: Contains 10 Christmas cards of the same charming nutcracker design, accompanied by 10 envelopes in a die-cut box
CHARITABLE IMPACT: All profits support Marie Curie's expert care and support services for families affected by terminal illness
PREMIUM QUALITY: Printed on FSC-certified board with professional finish, each card measures 14 x 14 centimetres
description: Spread holiday cheer while supporting a worthy cause with these beautifully designed Marie Curie Christmas cards. Each pack contains 10 cards featuring a charming watercolour illustration of four festive nutcrackers in blue uniforms, adorned with ornate hats and traditional details. The design is elegantly framed by a seasonal border of foliage, flowers, and red berries, with a 'Have a happy Christmas' message in graceful gold lettering. Measuring 14 x 14 centimetres, these premium quality cards are printed in the UK on FSC-certified board and come complete with 10 envelopes. The cards are blank inside, allowing you to write your personal message. By purchasing these cards, you're supporting Marie Curie, the UK's leading end-of-life care charity, helping them provide expert care and support to people living with terminal illness and their families. These cards arrive packaged in a convenient die-cut box, perfect for storing until you're ready to send your festive greetings.
